commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Sons. Septuagint and Arabic add, "of Zathoe, Sechenias, the son of Aziel. "The Syriac supplies the name of "Gado, the son of Nehzael "which seems to have been lost. (Calmet)
Junius translates, "of the descendants Sechenias N. son of Jahaziel."
